channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-29
item.description:
Our community has seen exciting progress across multiple projects recently. In the **regcheck** project, JamieCummins has made significant updates, including improvements to report text normalization, quote pop-ups, and UI output, as well as experimentation with embeddings. Meanwhile, giladfeldman's **escicheck** project has been updated with the latest versions of **effectcheck**, bringing in new features and enhancements. Additionally, shaheedazaad's **auto-zcurve** project has seen revisions to its validation note and documentation, and giovannacdelsordo's **output-it-forward** project now includes a convenient link to the Chrome Webstore. These updates demonstrate the connections and collaborations within our community, and we celebrate the hard work and dedication of our contributors. As our projects continue to evolve and improve, we look forward to seeing the impact of these advancements on our shared research goals.

35 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: escicheck, auto-zcurve

Most active:

regcheck16 commits
metacheck10 commits
docpluck7 commits
escicheck2 commits

item.title: regcheck: 9 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

Work was done on the "staging" branch, where "hardening multi-study extractions" was implemented. The `.gitignore` file was updated to reflect changes in the repository. The report text normalisation was improved, and quote pop-ups were fixed to resolve any existing issues. Additionally, quote chunking and UI output were updated, and experimentation with embeddings was conducted. The report render was also updated, and changes based on "Matilda suggestions" were incorporated, with final touches added to the multistudy CLI.

9 commit(s) today:

  • ae1de84 [staging] hardening multi-study extractions — Jamie Cummins
  • 2516dd5 [staging] Update .gitignore — Jamie Cummins
  • d1ee701 [staging] improve report text normalisation — Jamie Cummins
  • fc0bb51 [staging] fix quote pop-ups — Jamie Cummins
  • a8b610a [staging] update quote chunking and UI output — Jamie Cummins
  • c920500 [staging] embeddings experimentation — Jamie Cummins
  • d5e2697 [staging] update report render — Jamie Cummins
  • e3f869b [staging] improvements based on Matilda suggestions — Jamie Cummins
  • c682ed0 [staging] add finishing touches on multistudy cli — Jamie Cummins
  • fdfb805 [staging] improve local reporting — Jamie Cummins
  • 31fa103 [staging] improve multistudy ingestion — Jamie Cummins
  • b0d8ab2 [staging] debug of CLI report — Jamie Cummins
  • 97e8203 [staging] add further local LLM support in CLI — Jamie Cummins
  • df873ec [staging] UI fixes — Jamie Cummins
  • 5b53ad6 [staging] fix OSF + mutlistudy bugs — Jamie Cummins
  • 71be3be [staging] harden security features — Jamie Cummins
  • fbd5030 [staging] firm up qwen formatting — Jamie Cummins
  • f775856 [staging] improve qwen — Jamie Cummins
  • 724d020 [staging] re-add qwen! — Jamie Cummins
  • 89a1470 [staging] push for redeploy — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →

item.title: escicheck: 1 commit today
item.description:
giladfeldman/escicheck

The `main` branch was updated with a sync from `escicheckapp` at commit `57a791d`, which corresponds to `effectcheck` version `0.6.7`, as stated in the commit message "sync from escicheckapp@57a791d (effectcheck v0.6.7)". Another update was made to the `main` branch with a sync from `escicheckapp` at commit `f37b5a1`, which corresponds to `effectcheck` version `0.6.6`, as indicated by the commit message "sync from escicheckapp@f37b5a1 (effectcheck v0.6.6)". No other branches were worked on, with all changes occurring on the `main` branch. The commits brought `effectcheck` versions `0.6.6` and `0.6.7` into the repository. These updates were documented in issues `#20` and `#21`, respectively.

1 commit(s) today:

  • a154bdb [main] sync from escicheckapp@57a791d (effectcheck v0.6.7) (#21) — Gilad Feldman
  • 244b2d8 [main] sync from escicheckapp@f37b5a1 (effectcheck v0.6.6) (#20) — Gilad Feldman
  • a588210 [main] sync from escicheckapp@bd6f007 (effectcheck v0.6.5) (#19) — Gilad Feldman
  • 1d48c4e [main] sync from escicheckapp@dec37b1 (effectcheck v0.6.4) (#18) — Gilad Feldman
  • 4be3331 [main] sync from escicheckapp@f52d7ce (effectcheck v0.6.3) (#17) — Gilad Feldman

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: auto-zcurve: activity update
item.description:
shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve

The `main` branch was worked on, where the validation note was revised and a citation was included, as stated in the commit message "Revise validation note and include citation". No other branches were modified in this set of commits. The revision of the validation note and addition of a citation are the only changes made in this update. There are no new features or modules added in this commit. The commit only modified existing documentation or notes, with no changes to the codebase. The work was done by Shaheed Azaad on June 14, 2026.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
